journalName: RESEARCH ON LANGUAGE AND SOCIAL INTERACTION
raw_title: The “I have (someone)” method: Involving a hospital coworker in the matter at hand
title_en: The “I have (someone)” method: Involving a hospital coworker in the matter at hand
title_zh: “我有（某人）”方法：让医院同事参与当前事务
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了医院工作人员如何通过说“我有（某人）”来邀请同事参与处理当前事务。这种方法帮助医护人员协作解决问题，提高工作效率。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how hospital staff use the phrase 'I have (someone)' to involve coworkers in handling current matters. This approach helps healthcare professionals collaborate to solve problems and improve work efficiency.
research_direction_zh: 研究医院工作场所中的语言策略和协作沟通模式，探索如何通过特定表达方式促进团队合作和问题解决。
research_direction_en: Investigating linguistic strategies and collaborative communication patterns in hospital workplaces, exploring how specific expressions facilitate teamwork and problem-solving.
